_comment: SYNTHETIC DATA. Every message below is fabricated for AI Quickstart Track 4 labs. No real names, addresses, phone numbers, case IDs, or constituent records appear in this file. Generated 2026 for educational use under CC BY-SA 4.0. Departments are generic public-sector buckets, not tied to any specific agency.

text: There is a large pothole on Maple Street near the school crosswalk. A bike rider almost crashed yesterday.
label: public_works

text: A stray dog has been wandering my block for three days. It looks scared but not aggressive.
label: animal_services

text: My neighbor has not mowed in months. Grass is over two feet high and there is junk in the yard.
label: code_enforcement

text: The streetlight at the corner of 4th and Oak has been out for at least a week. It is very dark at night.
label: public_works

text: I would like to know how to apply for a building permit for a backyard shed.
label: permits_and_licensing

text: My recycling bin was not picked up this morning. Trash was, recycling was not.
label: sanitation

text: There is a raccoon in my attic. It has been there for two nights. I can hear it scratching.
label: animal_services

text: The sidewalk in front of my house is cracked and a section is lifted by tree roots. An older neighbor tripped last week.
label: public_works

text: I want to report a noise issue with construction starting at 5am every weekday.
label: code_enforcement

text: My water bill jumped from $40 to $310 this month with no change in usage. I think there is an error.
label: utilities_billing

text: What are the hours for the public library on holidays this year?
label: general_info

text: I need help understanding the rental assistance program. My hours got cut and I am behind.
label: human_services

text: There is a dead deer on the side of the highway near mile marker 12.
label: public_works

text: Someone is running a daycare out of their home with too many kids. The street is packed every morning.
label: code_enforcement

text: How do I renew my pet license? I think it expired last year.
label: animal_services

text: My block has not had trash pickup for two weeks. We are all stacking bags in the driveway.
label: sanitation

text: I want to apply for a food assistance program for my family. We had a hospital bill that wiped us out.
label: human_services

text: The traffic signal at Pine and 7th is stuck on red in all four directions. People are running it.
label: public_works

text: Can someone tell me where to vote? I just moved and I am not sure which precinct I am in.
label: general_info

text: There are coyotes coming into my backyard at dusk. I have small kids and a small dog.
label: animal_services

text: I need to schedule a building inspection for the new electrical panel I had installed.
label: permits_and_licensing

text: I saw rats around the dumpster behind the corner grocery store. It has been ongoing for months.
label: code_enforcement

text: Why was my water shut off without warning? I paid the bill last week.
label: utilities_billing

text: Can I get a copy of the city council minutes from last month's meeting?
label: general_info

text: My elderly mother needs the meal delivery program. She had a stroke and cannot cook.
label: human_services

text: There is graffiti on the playground equipment at Lincoln Park. Kids saw it this morning.
label: public_works

text: My neighbor's barking dog goes off every night from 11pm to 2am. I have not slept properly in weeks.
label: animal_services

text: The yard waste bin I requested two months ago never showed up. I called twice.
label: sanitation

text: Is there a homestead exemption I can apply for now that I am over 65?
label: general_info

text: An abandoned car has been parked in front of my house for over 30 days. Tags are expired.
label: code_enforcement

text: My storm drain is clogged and water is backing up onto the street when it rains.
label: public_works

text: I want to start a small food truck business. What permits do I need?
label: permits_and_licensing

text: There is a swarm of bees that built a hive on my back porch. I do not want to harm them.
label: animal_services

text: I have not had hot water for four days and my landlord will not respond. What can I do?
label: human_services

text: Can I dispute the late fee on my water bill? I was in the hospital and missed the due date.
label: utilities_billing

text: When does the leaf collection program start this fall?
label: sanitation

text: There are loose construction materials and nails in the road by the new development.
label: public_works

text: I need a copy of my own birth certificate for a passport application.
label: general_info

text: Someone is selling cars out of a residential driveway. There are five for sale right now.
label: code_enforcement

text: A duck is sitting on a nest in the parking lot at the community center. People keep almost stepping on her.
label: animal_services

text: My family qualifies for low-income utility assistance. How do I apply?
label: human_services

text: The new sign permit fees seem high. Can someone explain the fee schedule?
label: permits_and_licensing

text: Hydrant on our street is leaking. There is a steady stream of water running into the gutter.
label: public_works

text: Garbage truck broke a piece of my fence last week. Who do I file a damage claim with?
label: sanitation

text: I want to volunteer at the senior center. Where do I sign up?
label: general_info

text: Can the city remove a fallen tree that is blocking the sidewalk after the storm?
label: public_works

text: My ex turned off the utilities in my name without telling me. I think it is identity theft.
label: utilities_billing

text: There is a possum in the storm drain on my street. It has been there since this morning.
label: animal_services

text: Where can I get rental deposit assistance? I have a new lease but cannot cover the deposit.
label: human_services

text: Construction next door is dumping debris on my property line. Pictures attached.
label: code_enforcement

text: I want to know the speed limit on residential streets in this district.
label: general_info

text: My business license renewal portal is showing an error code 500. I cannot complete it online.
label: permits_and_licensing

text: Snow plow ripped up a chunk of my lawn last winter. I never got a response to my form.
label: public_works

text: I lost my recycling cart. I think someone took it from the curb after pickup.
label: sanitation

text: I am a veteran and I heard there is a property tax discount. How do I apply?
label: general_info

text: A cat in my neighborhood has been having kittens twice a year. Is there a free spay program?
label: animal_services

text: My household lost income and we are at risk of eviction. Is there emergency rental help?
label: human_services

text: Can someone explain the new short-term rental rules for residential property owners?
label: permits_and_licensing

text: Sewer backed up into my basement after the heavy rain. Standing water and smell are bad.
label: utilities_billing

text: Does the agency have a community garden program that residents can join?
label: general_info
